text: Inside this glass-walled room, my senses are heightened. The sterile architecture and quiet stillness invoke a feeling of curiosity mixed with unease, as if I'm both observer and observed. When I step closer to the R+D display, bathed in artificial light, the words on the wall echo my inner turmoil. There is a charge in the air—potential and vulnerability. I feel present, aware of the boundaries between self and environment, wondering what it means to connect and coexist with the unknown forces around me.
